Blocks.Text: If you have any questions relating to the clinical content of this discharge letter. Please contact us on:
number for clinical concerns; up to 28 days
The FHFT GP Centre website: https://www.fhft.nhs.uk/gps contains further, support details
including directories for: Routine and Urgent Advice for clinicians (including ward contact
details); all our Same Day Emergency Care Services (SDEC); and for non-urgent clinical
queries there is a list of Medical secretary/admin support email addresses' under the Referrals &
For Clinical Queries with regards to prescribing or Clinical content of this letter please contact the
Discharging Consultant through the Medical Secretary/Admin Support e-mail address available
